recommendations.title: Load Test Realtime Collaboration And Presence
recommendations.recommendation: Reduce collaboration polling and move more presence work into compact aggregated payloads.
recommendations.note: Presence and collaboration workbench latency exceeded the shared p95 threshold under concurrent load.

recommendations.title: Competitive Parity Checklist Toddle And Managebac
recommendations.recommendation: Flatten the publishing and exception workflows so the next action is reachable with one fewer route transition.
recommendations.note: Publishing and coordinator exception paths still require more route changes than the parity target.

recommendations.title: Ai Assist Family Summary Translation And Proofing
recommendations.recommendation: Keep family-facing AI suggestions gated behind explicit calm-mode proofing and locale-specific human review.
recommendations.note: One family translation suggestion required full rejection because tone drifted away from calm-mode expectations.

competitorThresholds.toddle: equal or better on publishing, evidence, and POI clarity
competitorThresholds.managebac: equal or better on DP milestone oversight and reporting calmness
